name: codex-rules
description: Inject project rule files into Codex context through lifecycle hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Injects local project rules into Codex
interface.longDescription: Codex Rules ports the pi-rules rule injector to Codex hooks. It loads AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, CONTEXT.md, .sisyphus/rules, .claude/rules, .cursor/rules, and GitHub instruction files, then injects matching static and file-specific guidance through SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, and PostToolUse hook context.
defaultPrompt: Show which project rules are being injected here.
Explain why this file matched project rules.
Disable Codex Rules for this session.
